title: Round 2 Residual Revision and Review Plan

items.title: Participation and representative profile
items.work: Define reference age, capacity, jurisdiction, safety, conflict, service, notice, and independent-review profiles without treating age as sole authority.

items.title: Representative authority evidence profile
items.work: Define representative types, proportionate evidence, verification strength by impact, expiry, conflict handling, and subject participation.

items.title: Retention and backup completion profiles
items.work: Create non-universal reference duration profiles, backup-deletion completion evidence, exception review deadlines, and jurisdiction qualification.

items.title: Service response and resource freshness profiles
items.work: Define evidence requirements for response targets, staffing, availability, resource verification, expiry, independent checks, and stale-resource behavior.

items.title: Re-baseline machine requirements
items.work: Re-derive normative requirements from 0.2.0-draft.1, preserve legacy requirement IDs through a mapping table, and stop presenting the 63-item historical index as complete for the revised drafts.

items.title: Re-baseline implementation acceptance tests
items.work: Update implementation-level acceptance specifications after requirement re-baselining while keeping source tests separate from product conformance tests.

items.title: Affected-person and domain review execution pack
items.work: Prepare and execute child, adolescent, parent, privacy, safeguarding, professional-boundary, accessibility, and jurisdiction review instruments before ambiguity closure or Candidate consideration.
